description: The expected auth material is absent before inspect or run start.
A single refresh attempt failed and the session must fail closed.
account/read did not match the ledgered principal fingerprint.
Observed workspace policy or working tree differed from the lease contract.
Session freshness checks failed preflight and the run should move to healthcheck or renewal.
The trusted execution host could not accept the run.
Another worker held the session lease or mutated the session concurrently.
The runtime cannot complete the expected Codex login flow.
The final runtime payload failed canonical schema validation.
The proposal bundle could not be repaired into a valid canonical payload.
The Codex exec JSONL stream contained a malformed or untyped event.
The Codex exec process exceeded the backend-owned runtime deadline.
The Codex exec process exited unsuccessfully or failed to write the final artifact.
The runtime request exceeded a backend-owned budget before launch.
The requested Codex runtime policy could not be enforced by the backend-controlled launcher.
The queue mutation requested by the worker did not match ledger state.
The same queue item was delivered beyond the allowed idempotency boundary.
Interactive user input could not be classified as structured research input.
An interactive trigger id was reused with a different request digest.
